text:
little energy: Freq CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident, over the past two weeks, has felt tired or had little energy. 0=Never or 1 day
1=2-6 days (several days)
2=7-11 days (half or more of the days)
3=12-14 days (nearly every day) effective 10/01/2023
873 APTIT_OVREATG_CD APTIT_OVREATG_CD D0150E1 Mood: Poor appetite or overeating: Pres CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident, over the past two weeks, has had a poor appetite or been overeating.
